description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a glossy black finish and a classic double-cutaway design reminiscent of the Fender Stratocaster style. The body features a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a dark fingerboard and dot inlays marking the fret positions. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, and the bridge includes a tremolo arm for pitch modulation. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, with the electronics cavity cover visible. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or practice in a garage or studio.
description: A glossy black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three pickups, and a maple neck with six inline tuners. Its classic design and solid build make it ideal for urban music settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body thickness and the protruding tremolo arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black back, neck, and the electronics cavity cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness and the edge of the pickguard and control knobs.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Stratocaster contour
